title: Gossip envelope publishes full issue snapshots and dedupes
description:
## Intent
As a console user, I want gossip notifications to carry the full updated issue so I can see changes before Git pulls.

## Gherkin
Feature: Gossip envelope
  Scenario: Publish an issue mutation with full snapshot
    Given a project "kbs" with issue "kbs-123"
    And a running gossip broker
    When the issue is updated locally
    Then a notification is published on "projects/kbs/events"
    And the payload includes id, ts, project, type, issue_id, event_id, producer_id
    And the payload includes the full issue JSON

  Scenario: Dedupe and ignore self
    Given a gossip receiver with producer_id "p1"
    And it has already seen notification id "n1"
    When it receives notification id "n1" from producer "p2"
    Then the notification is ignored
    When it receives notification id "n2" from producer "p1"
    Then the notification is ignored

## Definition of Done
- Envelope schema implemented in both runtimes.
- Dedupe and producer_id filtering behavior implemented with TTL.
creator: ryan.porter
